terms.label: DAU
terms.description: Daily active users — distinct players who opened the game on a given day.

terms.label: MAU
terms.description: Monthly active users — distinct players in a rolling 30-day window.

terms.label: WAU
terms.description: Weekly active users — distinct players in a rolling 7-day window.

terms.label: Stickiness
terms.description: DAU / MAU ratio — fraction of monthly players who play on any given day.

terms.label: D1 retention
terms.description: Share of new players from day N who returned on day N+1.

terms.label: D7 retention
terms.description: Share of new players from day N who returned on day N+7.

terms.label: D30 retention
terms.description: Share of new players from day N who returned on day N+30.

terms.label: Churn rate
terms.description: Fraction of active players who did not return in the following window.

terms.label: LTV
terms.description: Lifetime value — total revenue attributable to a single player or install cohort.

terms.label: ARPU
terms.description: Average revenue per user across all active users in the period.

terms.label: ARPPU
terms.description: Average revenue per paying user — restricted to players who made ≥1 purchase.

terms.label: ARPDAU
terms.description: Average revenue per daily active user — daily revenue divided by DAU.

terms.label: Payer conversion
terms.description: Share of active players who became payers in the period.

terms.label: Whale
terms.description: Top-spender player segment — typically the top 1% of payers by spend.

terms.label: Dolphin
terms.description: Mid-tier paying player segment — sits between minnow and whale spenders.

terms.label: Minnow
terms.description: Low-spending paying player segment.

terms.label: Gross revenue
terms.description: Total revenue collected before platform fees and refunds.

terms.label: Net revenue
terms.description: Revenue after platform fees, refunds, and taxes.

terms.label: ROAS
terms.description: Return on ad spend — revenue attributed to a cohort divided by acquisition cost.

terms.label: CPI
terms.description: Cost per install — total acquisition spend divided by installs in the period.

terms.label: CAC
terms.description: Customer acquisition cost — spend per net-new paying user.

terms.label: Installs
terms.description: Net new installs in the period (filtered to first-launch events).

terms.label: Session length
terms.description: Time between session start and session end for a single play.

terms.label: Sessions per user
terms.description: Average number of sessions per active user in the period.

terms.label: First purchase rate
terms.description: Share of new players who made their first purchase within N days.

terms.label: Engagement index
terms.description: Composite score blending sessions per user, session length, and stickiness.

terms.label: Cohort
terms.description: Group of players sharing an installation period (used for retention curves).

terms.label: Funnel
terms.description: Ordered sequence of player events used to measure step-by-step conversion.

terms.label: At-risk player
terms.description: Active player whose engagement is trending toward churn in a defined window.

terms.label: Engagement
terms.description: Umbrella term for repeat play (sessions, time, retention) — see specific metrics below.
